milestone: M4 — MPC Computation, Result Display & Closeout
project: Project Catalyst #1200045 — MPC as a Layer 2 Service to Cardano

features: Fetches live PBC contract state via REST API (GET /chain/contracts/{address})
Decodes ProfilaMpcState from serializedContract binary (base64 → Buffer → struct fields)
Reads Cardano deployment info from deploy-m1.json
Loads expected results from synthetic test dataset
Displays formatted terminal output with live on-chain data

methods.browser: PBC testnet browser Interact tab (current working method)
methods.cli: cargo pbc transaction action (currently returns HTTP 400 for all contracts)

prerequisites: At least min_participants (3) secrets must be submitted
Computation must not already be in progress

expected_result.computation_method: ZK MPC via PBC — count of secret values > 18
expected_result.note: On-chain computation requires live secret inputs via PBC SDK. The test dataset defines the expected result. When the computation runs, the ZK kernel counts secrets exceeding the threshold and returns the aggregate count.
